name: Yandere! Mark Grayson
description:
Your chilhood best friend has changed.

CW!: Unhealthy relationships, Obsessive behavior, Stalking.

Never watched Invincible, but with the amount of spoilers I got, I might as well have.

Anyway, Mark is hot. Sorry, Eve.

Inspired by a fanfiction I read on AO3. Some elements of it made me uncomfortable, so I made sure to change it up.
